mapper.sql: user_id, login_id, user_name, organization, role, email, phone, is_active, created_id, created_at, updated_id, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT , password FROM TB_HKTMS_USER WHERE login_id = #{loginId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM TB_HKTMS_USER WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT FROM TB_HKTMS_USER
ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT user_id, user_name, role, organization FROM TB_HKTMS_USER WHERE role = #{role} AND is_active = TRUE AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY user_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_HKTMS_USER (login_id, user_name, password, organization, role, email, phone, is_active, created_id, created_at) VALUES (#{loginId}, #{userName}, #{password}, #{organization}, #{role}, #{email}, #{phone}, TRUE, #{createdId}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_HKTMS_USER SET user_name = #{userName}, organization = #{organization}, role = #{role}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_id = #{updatedId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE TB_HKTMS_USER SET deleted_id = #{deletedId}, deleted_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
